examples: My forearm deflected the first punch.
He presses the bolt against a small hexagon tattooed on his forearm. The sizes match.
The forearm and torch of the Statue of Liberty were on display at the Centennial Exposition in Philadelphia, 1876.
The shooting shattered bones in his left forearm, requiring a plate to be inserted.
My boyfriend nods, a good sport with a long red scratch on his forearm.
